revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Auto_short_description%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Auto_short_description%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
'''Template:Auto short description''' should be placed on documentation pages of templates which automatically generate short description for pages transcluding them.

Pages tagged with this template are categorized in {{cl|Templates that generate short descriptions}}.

== Usage ==
{{Tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}

== Examples ==
* {{Suppress categories|{{Tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_show_result=y}}}}
* {{Suppress categories|{{Tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|sometimes{{=}}yes|_show_result=y}}}}
* {{Suppress categories|{{Tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|indirect{{=}}yes|_show_result=y}}}}
* {{Suppress categories|{{Tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|conditions{{=}}when it is used in Wikipedia space|_show_result=y}}}}
* {{Suppress categories|{{Tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|category{{=}}chemical elements|_show_result=y}}}}

== TemplateData ==
{{TemplateData header}}

<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"sometimes": {
			"description": "Any value will change \"adds an automatically generated short description\" to \"sometimes adds an automatically generated short description\" . Use for templates that only generate short descriptions under particular conditions.",
			"type": "boolean"
		},
		"indirect": {
			"description": "For templates that generate short descriptions via another template that is always embedded.",
			"type": "boolean"
		},
		"conditions": {
			"description": "When an explanation is desired for the conditions under which a short description is generated, e.g. when the short description template is wrapped with {{Namespace detect}}.",
			"type": "content",
			"example": "when it is used in Wikipedia space"
		},
		"category": {
			"description": "For meta-templates that generate short descriptions for a family of templates. For example, specifying \"chemical elements\" will categorize the templates in Category:Templates that generate short descriptions for chemical elements.",
			"type": "string",
			"example": "chemical elements"
		}
	}
}</templatedata>

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Template namespace templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
